content: اِلسَعاَدَة بِتيجي لَمّا بِتِبقى راَضي عَن حَياَتِكَ
translations: eng:happiness comes when you are content with your life

transcriptions.arabizi: ilsaAaeda biteegi lamma bitib'a raadi Aan hayaet|ak
